top_signals.title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
top_signals.summary: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yes Bank Hikes FX Deposit Rates to Attract Non-Resident Inflows
top_signals.summary: Yes Bank Ltd. has raised interest rates on foreign currency non-resident deposits by as much as 335 basis points, becoming one of the first Indian lenders to offer the program aimed at attracting capital flows and shore up the battered rupee.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Steady UK Assets Dodge Global Volatility
Debt cycle points to stronger case for gold price: Sprott
top_signals.summary: Sprott argues that investors are witnessing the later stages of a decades-long debt cycle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: What next for BP? Leadership exits test investor confidence in board oversight
top_signals.summary: An executive exodus at BP has sparked intense scrutiny from investors.

top_signals.title: Pension funds must ’embrace’ private markets to fuel growth
top_signals.summary: UK pension funds must stop hiding in public equity benchmarks and ‘embrace’ private markets in order to meet their obligations and accelerate economic growth, the group chief executive of one of the UK’s largest pension providers has argued. Andrew Evans, co-founder and group CEO of Smart Pension, urged providers to steer away from public markets [...]

top_signals.title: Older folks partake in oshikatsu activities in support of their favorite idols too
top_signals.summary: Experts say such activities help older people find purpose in life, adding that the popularity is likely to grow even more with the spread of live streaming.
